_meta.source: ltf_integrated-annual-report-fy2025-26.pdf (377pp, audited Ind AS financial statements + notes)
_meta.verified_by: orchestrator firsthand from pdftotext -layout, page-cited; INR crore
_meta.note: Closes the gaps flagged in the results-pack-only analysis: full ECL Stage 1/2/3 movement, write-offs, overlay/macro-prudential movement, KAMs, related-party, contingent liabilities, segment, secured/unsecured split. CONSOLIDATED unless noted.

list: Impairment of loans / Expected Credit Loss (ECL)
kams.ecl_kam_note: Auditors flag ECL as a KAM for high estimation uncertainty and management judgement, EXPLICITLY naming 'management overlay, the measurement of which is inherently judgmental and subject to a high level of estimation uncertainty', plus PD/LGD, stage classification (Max DPD), and macroeconomic overlays.
kams.opinion: UNMODIFIED (both standalone & consolidated); no emphasis of matter

macro_prudential_provision._note: ENTIRE Rs575cr macro-prudential buffer for Rural Group Loans & MFI unwound to NIL during FY26 (audited footnote). Bigger than the Rs125cr Q4 figure in the transcript - that was a slice; full-year audited release = Rs575cr.

ecl_loans_consolidated._read: Audited movement confirms: GS3 held down by Rs2,413cr write-offs; absolute gross Stage-3 +9.5% and net Stage-3 +29%; total ECL allowance FELL; macro-prudential buffer zeroed; Rs960cr net provision release on existing assets - the earnings lever, now audited not inferred.

brand_license_fee_to_LT._note: recurring promoter charge ~5% of PAT, +14% YoY; brand-fee payable ~155.15cr

related_party_LandT.read: Related-party dealings are modest, recurring and transparently disclosed; the L&T brand-license fee (Rs157cr) is the main item - a cost of the AAA-parent umbrella, not abusive RPT. No red flag.

contingent_liabilities_consolidated.read: Contingent liabilities small (~Rs308cr) and roughly flat - no hidden off-balance-sheet exposure. Closes the gap as a NON-issue.

secured_unsecured_split.read: Per the note, retail loans other than ~Rs62,013cr of unsecured loans are generally secured against property -> unsecured ~53% of the Rs1,16,049cr retail book, up ~+20% YoY. Audited confirmation of the rising unsecured mix into which coverage was cut.

wholesale_FVTPL.note: The Group is completely exiting the wholesale business by way of sell-down; the wholesale portfolio is classified at Fair Value through P&L (FVTPL) and is NOT in the ECL/Stage tables. Wholesale/SR markdowns flow through 'net gain/loss on fair value changes', explaining that line's volatility.

segment.status: Confirmed single reportable segment ('engaged primarily in the business of financing; no separate reportable segments per Ind AS 108') - no audited segment-level profitability/asset quality even in the full annual report.
